response: The radioshow that Frank Sinatra appeared on the year he won an Academy Award is **"The Show Band Show"**. This is indicated in the context, where it mentions that the live material of "Sinatra: London" includes a 1953 session from BBC Radio's "The Show Band Show". The session was part of the 1962 album "Sinatra Sings Great Songs from Great Britain" and was recorded before Sinatra won an Academy Award in 1967.
